subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise beseemeth the Sovereign of Eternity, Who through the fragrances of the Pen of Knowledge hath revealed "Verily, He is God." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ستایش مقدس از آفرینش سلطان قدم را سزاست که از نفحات قلم علم انه هوالله را بر
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement, @wisdom [hikmat], @transcendence; unknowability of God
